message:
fix(resilience): protect hook accesses with mutex in monitor

Fixed race condition where hook functions (checkSessionFn, sleepFn,
buildPaneCmdFn, sendKeysFn) were accessed without holding hooksMu
lock in checkHealth() and restartAgent(). These functions could be
modified by tests while being read by spawned goroutines.

Changes:
- Snapshot checkSessionFn under RLock in checkHealth()
- Snapshot sleepFn, buildPaneCmdFn, sendKeysFn under RLock in restartAgent()
- Updated all tests to use setHooksLocked() for thread-safe hook assignment

Found during "fresh eyes" code review session.
